summary: Successfully created Meeting Orchestrator v3 agent to replace legacy MG-* agents. New agent runs daily at 6 AM ET with consolidated meeting pipeline commands. Disabled duplicate and legacy agents. Verified email delivery and command execution.
learnings: The tick command doesn't accept --batch-size parameter, corrected agent instruction accordingly
Created duplicate agent during testing - disabled the older one (38316f92-8247-4507-bdfa-2d32a69b389b)
Legacy agent 7abf727e-9782-40b9-9ec2-62039040d7ef (Unified Meeting Pipeline Execution) was already disabled
Email delivery for agent notifications works correctly
